chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1814 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 05.12.2016. None present for petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel a/w SIP Atta Muhammad SHO P.S Nagarparkar and o/b of SSP Tharparkar. = None present for the petitioner. However, in the interest of justice, the matter is heard today. The State Counsel files parawise comments on behalf of police officials, wherein it has been stated that there is an old dispute between the petitioner and private respondents and police is not patronizing the private respondents and will discharge its functions in accordance with law. This petition is disposed of with the directions that private respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioner and police officials will act strictly in accordance with law and will ensure that no one takes law in his hands. SHO P.S Nangarparkar-Atta Muhammad present in Court is directed to serve copy of this order on the private respondents and such compliance report should be submitted within a week in this Court. JUDGE Shahid
